name: About me
title: for business growth
description: I'm engaged in full-stack development with a specialization in web products and Telegram-based solutions. I create and launch projects tailored to specific business needs: from landing pages and corporate websites to API services, CRM integrations, Telegram Mini Apps, and bots that automate routine processes.

cards.title: A product that delivers results
cards.description: I build interfaces that look premium and perform fast: clear structure, logical user flows, high conversion rates, and scalability readiness.

cards.title: Robust architecture and code
cards.description: I build maintainable architecture with an emphasis on quality: strict typing, reusable components, clean structure, and predictable project evolution.

cards.title: Telegram and automation
cards.description: I develop Mini Apps, bots, and integrations that reduce manual work, accelerate request processing, and provide transparent analytics.
